# AgentDesk

> AI support agent that grounds every answer in your own documents, embeds as a chat widget, and hands off to a human operator when judgment matters. RAG over tenant knowledge, live human takeover, tenant isolation.

AgentDesk is a developer-facing support platform. Upload policies, manuals, and help-center pages; the bot answers from retrieved context and escalates to a live operator with the full transcript preserved. Ships as an embeddable widget (script, iframe, React, Vue) plus a real-time operator inbox.

## Links

- [Homepage](https://agentdeskbot.vercel.app/)
- [Developer Docs](https://agentdeskbot.vercel.app/docs)
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/Purushotham-Prajapati-24/AgentDesk)

## Core capabilities

- Retrieval-augmented generation over tenant documents (Appwrite + Qdrant)
- Live human handoff via Socket.io with preserved session context
- Embeddable chat widget: script tag, iframe, React/Next.js, Vue
- Tenant isolation across knowledge base, widget config, and conversations
- Real-time monitoring of active support sessions

## Key concepts

- **RAG chatbot**: the bot answers from your uploaded documents, not generic model memory
- **Human handoff**: when confidence or policy requires it, the session escalates to a human operator who continues the same conversation
- **Tenant isolation**: prompts, documents, widget settings, and conversations stay scoped to one workspace
